description: Placeholder BDD module for future export variants.

scenarios.story: As a user, I want render --audio to mux an audio track.
scenarios.given: timeline.json references an audio asset and an output path.
scenarios.when: A future nextframe render --audio command runs
then: The exported mp4 contains a video stream
The exported mp4 contains an audio stream
The command returns progress and structured JSON

scenarios.story: As a user, I want to target an alternate renderer.
scenarios.given: A supported target id such as puppeteer or wasm exists.
scenarios.when: A future nextframe render --target <id> command runs
then: The requested target implementation is selected

scenarios.story: As a user, I want to adjust CRF for quality versus size.
scenarios.given: A valid timeline and numeric CRF value.
scenarios.when: A future nextframe render --crf <n> command runs
then: Bad CRF values fail fast with usage errors

scenarios.story: As a user, I want to probe export metadata after render.
scenarios.given: An mp4 exists on disk after export.
scenarios.when: A future nextframe probe command runs
then: Codec, resolution, duration, and stream count are shown
